# AI Study-to-Work Coach Demo Plan

Student persona: Maya Demo Student (undergraduate)

Recommended path: Career readiness copilot for scholarship and internship prep

Fit score: 81/100

## Skill Gaps

| Priority | Skill | Current | Target |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| medium | frontend | 46 | 58 |
| medium | product_thinking | 72 | 76 |
| medium | responsible_ai | 67 | 72 |
| medium | communication | 78 | 80 |

## Four-Week Plan

| Week | Step | Evidence | Human Gate |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 1 | Decision baseline: Confirm the student goal, constraints, target role, and success rubric. | Goal statement plus rubric snapshot. | Student approves goals before recommendations are used. |
| 2 | Skill-gap sprint: Practice the top two missing skills with one artifact per skill. | Two short artifacts and self-rating deltas. | Mentor or peer reviews evidence before the next step. |
| 3 | Portfolio artifact: Build and explain: A verified plan, portfolio rubric, and outreach-safe opportunity shortlist. | Portfolio page, demo screenshot, and transparent model notes. | Student confirms no private data appears in the artifact. |
| 4 | Opportunity match: Map the artifact to internships, scholarships, clubs, or research openings. | Shortlist with why-match reasoning and outreach draft. | Student approves each outreach action manually. |

## Guardrails

- Use synthetic demo personas unless a real student explicitly opts in.
- Never infer protected traits or rank students by worth; score only stated goals and skills.
- Show why every recommendation was made, including weak evidence and missing inputs.
- Keep career actions human-approved before outreach, applications, or public portfolio changes.
- Warn that the system supports decisions and does not guarantee jobs, admissions, or awards.
